# tfe_hyok_configuration

Generates a new TFE HYOK Configuration.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_pool_id` (String) The ID of the agent-pool to associate with the HYOK configuration.
- `kek_id` (String) Refers to the name of your key encryption key stored in your key management service.
- `name` (String) Label for the HYOK configuration to be used within HCP Terraform.
- `oidc_configuration_id` (String) The ID of the TFE OIDC configuration.
- `oidc_configuration_type` (String) The type of the TFE OIDC configuration.

### Optional

- `kms_options` (Block, Optional) Optional object used to specify additional fields for some key management services. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--kms_options))
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the TFE HYOK configuration belongs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the HYOK configuration.

<a id="nestedblock--kms_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `kms_options`

Optional:

- `key_location` (String) The location in which the GCP key ring exists.
- `key_region` (String) The AWS region where your key is located.
- `key_ring_id` (String) The root resource for Google Cloud KMS keys and key versions.
